// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Array
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{
    private static readonly ushort[] _keys = new ushort[] {
        ushort.MinValue, 1, 2, ushort.MaxValue
    };


    public static bool Contains(ushort key)
    {


        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            if (key == _keys[i])
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public const uint ItemCount = 4;
    public const ushort MinKey = ushort.MinValue;
    public const ushort MaxKey = ushort.MaxValue;
}
